page_metadata.biotools__summary: Multivariate state space model that integrates nucleotide sequence and chromatin accessibility data (currently uses only with MNase-seq or ATAC-seq) to compute genome-wide probabilistic occupancy landscape of nucleosomes and transciption factors (collectively known as DNA-binding factors or DBFs).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Multivariate state space model that integrates nucleotide sequence and chromatin accessibility data (currently uses only with MNase-seq or ATAC-seq) to compute genome-wide probabilistic occupancy landscape of nucleosomes and transciption factors (collectively known as DNA-binding factors or DBFs).
